---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem would this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.

**Describe the feature you'd like**
What should it do? How would it work?

**How important is this to you?**
- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Significantly improves my workflow
- [ ] Blocking me from using ComicArc

**Additional context**
Any mockups, examples from other apps, or extra context.

---

> **Note:** ComicArc is a personal project. Feature requests are noted but not guaranteed. 
> Pull requests are not accepted — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
